UniProtKB:
^>[a-z]{2}\|([^\|]+)\|
^>[a-z]{2}\|[^\|]+\|[^ ]+ (.+?(?=(?: [A-Z]{2}=)|$))
^>[a-z]{2}\|[^\|]+\|.+OS=(.+?(?=(?: [A-Z]{2}=)|$))

Refseq-Protein (NCBI downloads):
^>gi\|[0-9]+\|[a-z]+\|([^ ]+(?![ \|])[^ \|])
^>gi\|[0-9]+\|[a-z]+\|[^ ]+ ([^\[]+(?! \[))
^>gi\|[0-9]+\|[a-z]+\|[^\[]+\[([^\]]+)\]
